arts.ttl: Blackburn intensify contact as player ‘wants to try luck’ in England – Rovers make first offer
arts.sum: Yesterday, it was reported that Blackburn Rovers are now initiating a move to sign Cesena striker Augustus Kargbo. The move is now seemingly gathering pace and the Italian media is growing insistent on the potential transfer.
